candidate_summary: FLOAT-GLASS tin-bath null-space activation flattening: calibration-time per-layer PCA reference manifold M_l (top-k principal directions, head-wise) + inference-time alpha-attenuation of null-space-relative-to-reference component (a_flat = Proj_M(a) + alpha * (a - Proj_M(a))). Inference-only, no retraining.

results_analysis.title: ESPACE: Dimensionality Reduction of Activations for Model Compression
results_analysis.note: EXACT TWIN: pre-calibrated PCA + activation projection mechanism.

results_analysis.title: FLAT-LLM Fine-grained Low-rank Activation Space
results_analysis.note: Same head-wise PCA on activations with truncated eigenvectors; candidate's own novelty_claim acknowledges FLAT-LLM as prior art.

results_analysis.title: Activation Manifold Projection (CAST)
results_analysis.note: Activation manifold projection — same conceptual family.

results_analysis.title: Curveball Steering: pKPCA Curved Activation Manifold
results_analysis.note: Decomposes activation into manifold component + residual via pKPCA — identical decomposition logic to FLOAT-GLASS Proj_M(a) + null.

results_analysis.title: Don't Lose Focus: Activation Steering via Key-Orthogonal Projections (SKOP)
CoQuant: Joint Weight-Activation Subspace Projection
results_analysis.note: Closed-form weighted PCA combining activation+weight covariance — adjacent inference-time projection family.

results_analysis.title: Language Steering in Latent Space (Code-switching)
results_analysis.note: Inference-only PCA-derived subspace projection steering — same inference-time discipline.

results_analysis.title: Demystifying Manifold Constraints in LLM Pre-training
results_analysis.note: Pretraining-time manifold constraints — different lifecycle stage; not inference-time projection.

verdict_sentence: FLOAT-GLASS fails novelty: 7 independent prior-art hits across all three independent scoring channels (kw>=2, sem>=0.7, func>=0.7), including the exact twin ESPACE (func=0.93, sem=0.92) which already implements pre-calibrated PCA activation projection at inference time, plus FLAT-LLM head-wise activation PCA acknowledged by the candidate itself, and Curveball pKPCA which decomposes activations into manifold-component + residual identically to FLOAT-GLASS's Proj_M + null-space split.
